chunks.title: God's Foreknowledge and Refinement
chunks.reason: Yahweh argues that He declared future events to prove His sovereignty and refine Israel despite their stubbornness.

chunks.title: The Servant's Mission
chunks.reason: A distinct speech where the Servant speaks of being sent by Yahweh to execute judgment on Babylon.

chunks.title: The Blessing of Obedience
chunks.reason: A conditional promise outlining the blessings of peace and progeny if Israel had kept God's commandments.

chunks.title: Call to Depart Babylon
chunks.reason: A direct call for the people to leave Babylon and proclaim God's redemption, referencing the wilderness journey.

chunks.title: Conclusion on the Wicked
chunks.reason: A final prophetic statement contrasting the peace of the redeemed with the lack thereof for the wicked.
